metadata.title: Bamboo Leaf Studios: Apps, Games & Digital Experiences
metadata.description: We craft exceptional mobile apps, games, and digital experiences with minimalist design and seamless interactions.

hero.label: App & Game Studio
hero.title: Less noise. More
hero.subtitle: We craft mobile apps, games, and digital experiences that stand out through exceptional design, fluidity, and minimalism.

about.label: Who We Are
about.description_1: Bamboo Leaf Studios is a development studio based in Mexico City, founded on the belief that digital experiences should be not just functional, but genuinely delightful. We reinvent everyday concepts with exceptional design, from musical alarm clocks to liquid audio visualizers.
about.description_2: Our mission is to create immersive, interactive digital experiences that prioritize user experience, fluidity, and minimalism in every product we build.

design_first.title: Design First
design_first.description: Every pixel is intentional, every interaction is intuitive.

user_experience.title: User Experience
user_experience.description: Apps that are not just useful, but a pleasure to use.

minimalism.title: Functional Minimalism
minimalism.description: Less is more, when it's done right.

game_dev.title: Game Development
game_dev.description: Casual games, puzzles, and interactive artistic experiences built with Unity3D. Designed to captivate from the first tap.

app_dev.title: App Development
app_dev.description: Cross-platform mobile applications that reimagine everyday tools with premium aesthetics and seamless performance.

web_dev.title: Web Development
web_dev.description: Modern, responsive websites and web applications built with the latest technologies. Fast, elegant, and built to convert.

consulting.title: B2B Consulting
consulting.description: Custom app development, technical consulting, and end-to-end project delivery for businesses that demand excellence.

ideation.title: Ideation
ideation.description: We explore concepts, research the market, and define the vision for the product.

prototype.title: Prototype
prototype.description: Rapid prototyping to validate ideas and nail the user experience early.

production.title: Production
production.description: Full development with obsessive attention to design quality and performance.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Strategic release, post-launch iteration, and continuous improvement based on data.

liquid-piano.name: Liquid Piano
liquid-piano.description: Turn touch into music. Tap anywhere to play harmonious notes over stunning real-time fluid simulations. No musical training required — just feel the sound.

calculadora-aranceles.name: Calculadora de Aranceles
calculadora-aranceles.description: Professional fee calculator for the Colegio de Arquitectos de Mexico. Computes project costs based on type, scope, location, BIM levels, and 18+ architectural categories.

notegrid.name: NoteGrid
notegrid.description: Train your ear through play. Listen to melodies and recreate them on a grid-based sequencer, with 100+ levels of progressively challenging musical puzzles and daily ear training exercises.

wimbo.name: Wimbo
wimbo.description: Learn to read music through six game-based exercises covering notes, chords, rhythm, and ear training. No ads, no prior experience needed, just play your way to musical literacy.

tapmap.name: Tapmap
tapmap.description: An interactive 3D globe for exploring countries, capitals, and geography. Built for students, travelers, and geography enthusiasts with an ultra-realistic visual experience.

contact.label: Let's Work Together
contact.title: Have a project in mind?
contact.description: Whether you need a mobile app, a game, a website, or a custom solution: we'd love to hear about it.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Bamboo Leaf Studios. All rights reserved.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
